package rulecoverage

func PositiveServiceMethodImportsHttpStatusOrAbortSemantics() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_imports_http_status_or_abort_semantics"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Services that depend on transport-specific status constants, abort helpers, or Gin response behavior."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
